center.name: 海达瓜依
center.summary: 海达瓜依是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括黑顶山雀，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It can also be found in the Appalachian Mountains at higher elevations. In British Columbia, the black-capped chickadee is absent on Vancouver Island, the Gulf Islands, Haida Gwaii, and parts of the Sunshine Coast, where it is replaced by the chestnut-backed chickadee.{{cite web |last1=Wright |first1=K
